rationale: A0 confirms PowerShell importing SharpHound.ps1 from C:\Temp\ under corp\Administrator at High integrity, a well-known BloodHound AD reconnaissance loader. EV-001 confirms the SharpHound.exe binary was subsequently executed with '--CollectionMethod all', enumerating the full Active Directory environment. EV-002 through EV-008 confirm successful completion of the collection run, with SharpHound.exe producing timestamped JSON output files covering groups, GPOs, users, OUs, domains, computers, and a final BloodHound.zip archive — all canonical BloodHound data-collection artifacts. The entire kill-chain (loader import → binary execution → full AD enumeration → zip packaging) is directly evidenced with no benign explanation; use of C:\Temp\ as a staging directory and execution via cmd.exe wrappers further indicates deliberate, hands-on-keyboard adversary activity.
